title: Enhanced Vanilla!
description:
basically, all them mods you would want to play the game, better!

includes 100% client sided mods, so you can join any server and have 0 issues.
body:
Play Minecraft, but better!

This modpack is 100% client sided, and adds many features that should be in the base game already! Tons of visual mods which make the game feel a lot more lively, and has tweaker mods that allow you to change many base Minecraft mechanics to your own liking. (please read description for each version, might have client sided (only) fixes for some stuff that i cannot fix through the modpack releases)


FAQ

1. What is Fresh Moves?
   
   Fresh moves is a player based animation resource pack, which adds player movement animations, as well as eye movements. For more info, watch this [video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uEyeM7gB8NQ)
   Eye movements require a custom made player skin, if you do not want eye animations use the EYELESS FRESH MOVES pack.

  Fresh Moves might also need a few other settings, follow these: [wiki](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki), [black eyes fix](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Fix-Black-Eyes), [weird hand animation anomaly](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Fix-Moving-1st-Person-Hand).

  I am also sorry if these steps seem complicated, but the overall experience after setting this up is really smooth, and would recommend the resource pack in any modpack.
   
2. Would like to suggest mods!
   
   To suggest mods, DM me on Discord 
   Username- aks5
   
3. The modpack doesn't work well!
   
   For modpack related issues, also DM me on Discord. I'll try to reach out and help you out with the issues. the modpack is in it's early stages, so it will have issues.
   
4. Why no 3D Skin Layers? 
   
   3D Skin Layers causes issues with Fresh Moves. I have preffered player animations over 3D Skin Layers. If you would like to change that, you can manually add it to the mods folder and turn off Fresh Moves :) again im sorry for the inconvenience :(

5. What's Craftify?

   Craftify is a Spotify integration to Minecraft. During first launch, run the command shown in chat and connect your Spotify account. Then, all songs that play are shown as pretty well themed pop-ups, and you can control your music through Minecraft itself :D It's really well made, please do link your account.
